name: { Serenia } Ghost Princess
description:
Princess Serinia, the once heart of the entire kingdom of Eldeita. Gentle and kind, her warmth shown throughout the land all the way up to her death. However, after she died, frequent sightings of her angered, or tormented, soul began to appear, driving her away. Can you find out why she continue to haunt the land and help her pass on? Or will you forcefully exorcise her, leaving her story unknown...?

--------------------------------------------------------

UMM so this was a really old request I didn't see and I thought "wow thats fire!" Sorry for me like- disappearing. I actually get a lot of anxiety when I try to post bots. It's surprisingly stressful 'cause I don't wanna produce dookie ykwim?? UM be patient with me, if you wanna stick around. Thats it! :3 Also please give feedback. I feel like the intro is too long, so if it is just let me know and I'll shorten it or tweak it. I lurk and just read all the feedback all the time so it'd be greatly appreciated!
